calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-31-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Continued To Apr-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marc Litton, Esq. 415-421-4774 and John Vannucci, Esq. 415-981-7500 for Plaintiff Janine Zavosky.
Paul Peters Esq. 415-949-1900 of Demler Armstrong & Rowland for Defendant FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares his views. Defendant argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues.

Defendant Farmers Insurance Exchange's motion for summary adjudication as to the second cause of action for breach of the covenant of good faith and fair dealing and the request for punitive damages in the complaint filed by Janine and Michael Zavosky is denied in its entirety. There are triable disputes whether Farmers: a) conducted a reasonable and thorough investigation and complied with its good faith obligations as stated in CACI 2330 and b) acted with malice or oppression as those terms are defined in Civil Code 3294. Farmers' objections to the Painter and Frangiamore declarations are overruled. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, mtorreano@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Set For Trial On Feb-26-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
